verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they had come out of the land of Egypt, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tabernacle of the congregation, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they were come out of the land of Egypt, saying,
verses.bsb: On the first day of the second month of the second year after the Israelites had come out of the land of Egypt, the LORD spoke to Moses in the Tent of Meeting in the Wilderness of Sinai. He said:

verses.esv: “Take a census of all the congregation of the people of Israel, by clans, by fathers' houses, according to the number of names, every male, head by head.
verses.kjv: Take ye the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, after their families, by the house of their fathers, with the number of their names, every male by their polls;
verses.bsb: “Take a census of the whole congregation of Israel by their clans and families, listing every man by name, one by one.

verses.esv: From twenty years old and upward, all in Israel who are able to go to war, you and Aaron shall list them, company by company.
verses.kjv: From twenty years old and upward, all that are able to go forth to war in Israel: thou and Aaron shall number them by their armies.
verses.bsb: You and Aaron are to number those who are twenty years of age or older by their divisions—everyone who can serve in Israel’s army.

verses.esv: And there shall be with you a man from each tribe, each man being the head of the house of his fathers.
verses.kjv: And with you there shall be a man of every tribe; every one head of the house of his fathers.
verses.bsb: And one man from each tribe, the head of each family, must be there with you.

verses.esv: And these are the names of the men who shall assist you. From Reuben, Elizur the son of Shedeur;
verses.kjv: ¶ And these are the names of the men that shall stand with you: of the tribe of Reuben; Elizur the son of Shedeur.
verses.bsb: These are the names of the men who are to assist you:  From the tribe of Reuben, Elizur son of Shedeur;

verses.esv: from Simeon, Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai;
verses.kjv: Of Simeon; Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
verses.bsb: from Simeon, Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai;

verses.esv: from Judah, Nahshon the son of Amminadab;
verses.kjv: Of Judah; Nahshon the son of Amminadab.
verses.bsb: from Judah, Nahshon son of Amminadab;

verses.esv: from Issachar, Nethanel the son of Zuar;
verses.kjv: Of Issachar; Nethaneel the son of Zuar.
verses.bsb: from Issachar, Nethanel son of Zuar;

verses.esv: from Zebulun, Eliab the son of Helon;
verses.kjv: Of Zebulun; Eliab the son of Helon.
verses.bsb: from Zebulun, Eliab son of Helon;

verses.esv: from the sons of Joseph, from Ephraim, Elishama the son of Ammihud, and from Manasseh, Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur;
verses.kjv: Of the children of Joseph: of Ephraim; Elishama the son of Ammihud: of Manasseh; Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
verses.bsb: from the sons of Joseph:   from Ephraim, Elishama son of Ammihud,   and from Manasseh, Gamaliel son of Pedahzur;

verses.esv: from Benjamin, Abidan the son of Gideoni;
verses.kjv: Of Benjamin; Abidan the son of Gideoni.
verses.bsb: from Benjamin, Abidan son of Gideoni;

verses.esv: from Dan, Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai;
verses.kjv: Of Dan; Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
verses.bsb: from Dan, Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai;

verses.esv: from Asher, Pagiel the son of Ochran;
verses.kjv: Of Asher; Pagiel the son of Ocran.
verses.bsb: from Asher, Pagiel son of Ocran;

verses.esv: from Gad, Eliasaph the son of Deuel;
verses.kjv: Of Gad; Eliasaph the son of Deuel.
verses.bsb: from Gad, Eliasaph son of Deuel;

verses.esv: from Naphtali, Ahira the son of Enan.”
verses.kjv: Of Naphtali; Ahira the son of Enan.
verses.bsb: and from Naphtali, Ahira son of Enan.”

verses.esv: These were the ones chosen from the congregation, the chiefs of their ancestral tribes, the heads of the clans of Israel.
verses.kjv: These were the renowned of the congregation, princes of the tribes of their fathers, heads of thousands in Israel.
verses.bsb: These men were appointed from the congregation; they were the leaders of the tribes of their fathers, the heads of the clans of Israel.

verses.esv: Moses and Aaron took these men who had been named,
verses.kjv: ¶ And Moses and Aaron took these men which are expressed by their names:
verses.bsb: So Moses and Aaron took these men who had been designated by name,

verses.esv: and on the first day of the second month, they assembled the whole congregation together, who registered themselves by clans, by fathers' houses, according to the number of names from twenty years old and upward, head by head,
verses.kjv: And they assembled all the congregation together on the first day of the second month, and they declared their pedigrees after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, by their polls.
verses.bsb: and on the first day of the second month they assembled the whole congregation and recorded their ancestry by clans and families, counting one by one the names of those twenty years of age or older,

verses.esv: as the LORD commanded Moses. So he listed them in the wilderness of Sinai.
verses.kjv: As the Lord commanded Moses, so he numbered them in the wilderness of Sinai.
verses.bsb: just as the LORD had commanded Moses.  So Moses numbered them in the Wilderness of Sinai:

verses.esv: The people of Reuben, Israel's firstborn, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, head by head, every male from twenty years old and upward, all who were able to go to war:
verses.kjv: And the children of Reuben, Israel’s eldest son, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel, according to the records of their clans and families, counting one by one the names of every male twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Reuben were 46,500.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Reuben, were forty and six thousand and five hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Reuben numbered 46,500.

verses.esv: Of the people of Simeon, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, those of them who were listed, according to the number of names, head by head, every male from twenty years old and upward, all who were able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Simeon, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, those that were numbered of them, according to the number of the names, by their polls, every male from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Simeon, according to the records of their clans and families, counting one by one the names of every male twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Simeon were 59,300.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Simeon, were fifty and nine thousand and three hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Simeon numbered 59,300.

verses.esv: Of the people of Gad, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all who were able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Gad, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Gad, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Gad were 45,650.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Gad, were forty and five thousand six hundred and fifty.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Gad numbered 45,650.

verses.esv: Of the people of Judah, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Judah, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Judah, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Judah were 74,600.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Judah, were threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Judah numbered 74,600.

verses.esv: Of the people of Issachar, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Issachar, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Issachar, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Issachar were 54,400.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Issachar, were fifty and four thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Issachar numbered 54,400.

verses.esv: Of the people of Zebulun, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Zebulun, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Zebulun, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Zebulun were 57,400.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Zebulun, were fifty and seven thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Zebulun numbered 57,400.

verses.esv: Of the people of Joseph, namely, of the people of Ephraim, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Joseph, namely, of the children of Ephraim, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Joseph:

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Ephraim were 40,500.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Ephraim, were forty thousand and five hundred.
verses.bsb: From the sons of Ephraim, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army, those registered to the tribe of Ephraim numbered 40,500.

verses.esv: Of the people of Manasseh, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Manasseh, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: And from the sons of Manasseh, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Manasseh were 32,200.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Manasseh, were thirty and two thousand and two hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Manasseh numbered 32,200.

verses.esv: Of the people of Benjamin, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Benjamin, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Benjamin, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Benjamin were 35,400.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Benjamin, were thirty and five thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Benjamin numbered 35,400.

verses.esv: Of the people of Dan, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Dan, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Dan, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Dan were 62,700.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Dan, were threescore and two thousand and seven hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Dan numbered 62,700.

verses.esv: Of the people of Asher, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Asher, by their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Asher, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Asher were 41,500.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Asher, were forty and one thousand and five hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Asher numbered 41,500.

verses.esv: Of the people of Naphtali, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers' houses, according to the number of names, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war:
verses.kjv: ¶ Of the children of Naphtali, throughout their generations, after their families, by the house of their fathers, according to the number of the names, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war;
verses.bsb: From the sons of Naphtali, according to the records of their clans and families, counting the names of all those twenty years of age or older who could serve in the army,

verses.esv: those listed of the tribe of Naphtali were 53,400.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, even of the tribe of Naphtali, were fifty and three thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: those registered to the tribe of Naphtali numbered 53,400.

verses.esv: These are those who were listed, whom Moses and Aaron listed with the help of the chiefs of Israel, twelve men, each representing his fathers' house.
verses.kjv: These are those that were numbered, which Moses and Aaron numbered, and the princes of Israel, being twelve men: each one was for the house of his fathers.
verses.bsb: These were the men numbered by Moses and Aaron, with the assistance of the twelve leaders of Israel, each one representing his family.

verses.esv: So all those listed of the people of Israel, by their fathers' houses, from twenty years old and upward, every man able to go to war in Israel—
verses.kjv: So were all those that were numbered of the children of Israel, by the house of their fathers, from twenty years old and upward, all that were able to go forth to war in Israel;
verses.bsb: So all the Israelites twenty years of age or older who could serve in Israel’s army were counted according to their families.

verses.esv: all those listed were 603,550.
verses.kjv: Even all they that were numbered were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
verses.bsb: And all those counted totaled 603,550.

verses.esv: But the Levites were not listed along with them by their ancestral tribe.
verses.kjv: ¶ But the Levites after the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.
verses.bsb: The Levites, however, were not numbered along with them by the tribe of their fathers.

verses.esv: For the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: For the Lord had spoken unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: For the LORD had said to Moses:

verses.esv: “Only the tribe of Levi you shall not list, and you shall not take a census of them among the people of Israel.
verses.kjv: Only thou shalt not number the tribe of Levi, neither take the sum of them among the children of Israel:
verses.bsb: “Do not number the tribe of Levi in the census with the other Israelites.

verses.esv: But appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of the testimony, and over all its furnishings, and over all that belongs to it. They are to carry the tabernacle and all its furnishings, and they shall take care of it and shall camp around the tabernacle.
verses.kjv: But thou shalt appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of testimony, and over all the vessels thereof, and over all things that belong to it: they shall bear the tabernacle, and all the vessels thereof; and they shall minister unto it, and shall encamp round about the tabernacle.
verses.bsb: Instead, you are to appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of the Testimony, all its furnishings, and everything in it. They shall carry the tabernacle and all its articles, care for it, and camp around it.

verses.esv: When the tabernacle is to set out, the Levites shall take it down, and when the tabernacle is to be pitched, the Levites shall set it up. And if any outsider comes near, he shall be put to death.
verses.kjv: And when the tabernacle setteth forward, the Levites shall take it down: and when the tabernacle is to be pitched, the Levites shall set it up: and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.
verses.bsb: Whenever the tabernacle is to move, the Levites are to take it down, and whenever it is to be pitched, the Levites are to set it up. Any outsider who goes near it must be put to death.

verses.esv: The people of Israel shall pitch their tents by their companies, each man in his own camp and each man by his own standard.
verses.kjv: And the children of Israel shall pitch their tents, every man by his own camp, and every man by his own standard, throughout their hosts.
verses.bsb: The Israelites are to camp by their divisions, each man in his own camp and under his own standard.

verses.esv: But the Levites shall camp around the tabernacle of the testimony, so that there may be no wrath on the congregation of the people of Israel. And the Levites shall keep guard over the tabernacle of the testimony.”
verses.kjv: But the Levites shall pitch round about the tabernacle of testimony, that there be no wrath upon the congregation of the children of Israel: and the Levites shall keep the charge of the tabernacle of testimony.
verses.bsb: But the Levites are to camp around the tabernacle of the Testimony and watch over it, so that no wrath will fall on the congregation of Israel. So the Levites are responsible for the tabernacle of the Testimony.”

verses.esv: Thus did the people of Israel; they did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses.
verses.kjv: And the children of Israel did according to all that the Lord commanded Moses, so did they.
verses.bsb: Thus the Israelites did everything just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron:

verses.esv: “The people of Israel shall camp each by his own standard, with the banners of their fathers' houses. They shall camp facing the tent of meeting on every side.
verses.kjv: Every man of the children of Israel shall pitch by his own standard, with the ensign of their father’s house: far off about the tabernacle of the congregation shall they pitch.
verses.bsb: “The Israelites are to camp around the Tent of Meeting at a distance from it, each man under his standard, with the banners of his family.

verses.esv: Those to camp on the east side toward the sunrise shall be of the standard of the camp of Judah by their companies, the chief of the people of Judah being Nahshon the son of Amminadab,
verses.kjv: And on the east side toward the rising of the sun shall they of the standard of the camp of Judah pitch throughout their armies: and Nahshon the son of Amminadab shall be captain of the children of Judah.
verses.bsb: On the east side, toward the sunrise, the divisions of Judah are to camp under their standard:

verses.esv: his company as listed being 74,600.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred.
verses.bsb: The leader of the descendants of Judah is Nahshon son of Amminadab, and his division numbers 74,600.

verses.esv: Those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Issachar, the chief of the people of Issachar being Nethanel the son of Zuar,
verses.kjv: And those that do pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of Issachar: and Nethaneel the son of Zuar shall be captain of the children of Issachar.
verses.bsb: The tribe of Issachar will camp next to it. The leader of the Issacharites is Nethanel son of Zuar,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 54,400.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered thereof, were fifty and four thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 54,400.

verses.esv: Then the tribe of Zebulun, the chief of the people of Zebulun being Eliab the son of Helon,
verses.kjv: Then the tribe of Zebulun: and Eliab the son of Helon shall be captain of the children of Zebulun.
verses.bsb: Next will be the tribe of Zebulun. The leader of the Zebulunites is Eliab son of Helon,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 57,400.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered thereof, were fifty and seven thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 57,400.

verses.esv: All those listed of the camp of Judah, by their companies, were 186,400. They shall set out first on the march.
verses.kjv: All that were numbered in the camp of Judah were an hundred thousand and fourscore thousand and six thousand and four hundred, throughout their armies. These shall first set forth.
verses.bsb: The total number of men in the divisions of the camp of Judah is 186,400; they shall set out first.

verses.esv: “On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben by their companies, the chief of the people of Reuben being Elizur the son of Shedeur,
verses.kjv: ¶ On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben according to their armies: and the captain of the children of Reuben shall be Elizur the son of Shedeur.
verses.bsb: On the south side, the divisions of Reuben are to camp under their standard:

verses.esv: his company as listed being 46,500.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered thereof, were forty and six thousand and five hundred.
verses.bsb: The leader of the Reubenites is Elizur son of Shedeur, and his division numbers 46,500.

verses.esv: And those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Simeon, the chief of the people of Simeon being Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai,
verses.kjv: And those which pitch by him shall be the tribe of Simeon: and the captain of the children of Simeon shall be Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
verses.bsb: The tribe of Simeon will camp next to it. The leader of the Simeonites is Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 59,300.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were fifty and nine thousand and three hundred.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 59,300.

verses.esv: Then the tribe of Gad, the chief of the people of Gad being Eliasaph the son of Reuel,
verses.kjv: Then the tribe of Gad: and the captain of the sons of Gad shall be Eliasaph the son of Reuel.
verses.bsb: Next will be the tribe of Gad. The leader of the Gadites is Eliasaph son of Deuel,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 45,650.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were forty and five thousand and six hundred and fifty.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 45,650.

verses.esv: All those listed of the camp of Reuben, by their companies, were 151,450. They shall set out second.
verses.kjv: All that were numbered in the camp of Reuben were an hundred thousand and fifty and one thousand and four hundred and fifty, throughout their armies. And they shall set forth in the second rank.
verses.bsb: The total number of men in the divisions of the camp of Reuben is 151,450; they shall set out second.

verses.esv: “Then the tent of meeting shall set out, with the camp of the Levites in the midst of the camps; as they camp, so shall they set out, each in position, standard by standard.
verses.kjv: ¶ Then the tabernacle of the congregation shall set forward with the camp of the Levites in the midst of the camp: as they encamp, so shall they set forward, every man in his place by their standards.
verses.bsb: In the middle of the camps, the Tent of Meeting is to travel with the camp of the Levites. They are to set out in the order they encamped, each in his own place under his standard.

verses.esv: “On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim by their companies, the chief of the people of Ephraim being Elishama the son of Ammihud,
verses.kjv: ¶ On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim according to their armies: and the captain of the sons of Ephraim shall be Elishama the son of Ammihud.
verses.bsb: On the west side, the divisions of Ephraim are to camp under their standard:

verses.esv: his company as listed being 40,500.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were forty thousand and five hundred.
verses.bsb: The leader of the Ephraimites is Elishama son of Ammihud, and his division numbers 40,500.

verses.esv: And next to him shall be the tribe of Manasseh, the chief of the people of Manasseh being Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur,
verses.kjv: And by him shall be the tribe of Manasseh: and the captain of the children of Manasseh shall be Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
verses.bsb: The tribe of Manasseh will be next to it. The leader of the Manassites is Gamaliel son of Pedahzur,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 32,200.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were thirty and two thousand and two hundred.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 32,200.

verses.esv: Then the tribe of Benjamin, the chief of the people of Benjamin being Abidan the son of Gideoni,
verses.kjv: Then the tribe of Benjamin: and the captain of the sons of Benjamin shall be Abidan the son of Gideoni.
verses.bsb: Next will be the tribe of Benjamin. The leader of the Benjamites is Abidan son of Gideoni,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 35,400.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were thirty and five thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 35,400.

verses.esv: All those listed of the camp of Ephraim, by their companies, were 108,100. They shall set out third on the march.
verses.kjv: All that were numbered of the camp of Ephraim were an hundred thousand and eight thousand and an hundred, throughout their armies. And they shall go forward in the third rank.
verses.bsb: The total number of men in the divisions of the camp of Ephraim is 108,100; they shall set out third.

verses.esv: “On the north side shall be the standard of the camp of Dan by their companies, the chief of the people of Dan being Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai,
verses.kjv: ¶ The standard of the camp of Dan shall be on the north side by their armies: and the captain of the children of Dan shall be Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
verses.bsb: On the north side, the divisions of Dan are to camp under their standard:

verses.esv: his company as listed being 62,700.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were threescore and two thousand and seven hundred.
verses.bsb: The leader of the Danites is Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai, and his division numbers 62,700.

verses.esv: And those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Asher, the chief of the people of Asher being Pagiel the son of Ochran,
verses.kjv: And those that encamp by him shall be the tribe of Asher: and the captain of the children of Asher shall be Pagiel the son of Ocran.
verses.bsb: The tribe of Asher will camp next to it. The leader of the Asherites is Pagiel son of Ocran,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 41,500.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were forty and one thousand and five hundred.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 41,500.

verses.esv: Then the tribe of Naphtali, the chief of the people of Naphtali being Ahira the son of Enan,
verses.kjv: ¶ Then the tribe of Naphtali: and the captain of the children of Naphtali shall be Ahira the son of Enan.
verses.bsb: Next will be the tribe of Naphtali. The leader of the Naphtalites is Ahira son of Enan,

verses.esv: his company as listed being 53,400.
verses.kjv: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were fifty and three thousand and four hundred.
verses.bsb: and his division numbers 53,400.

verses.esv: All those listed of the camp of Dan were 157,600. They shall set out last, standard by standard.”
verses.kjv: All they that were numbered in the camp of Dan were an hundred thousand and fifty and seven thousand and six hundred. They shall go hindmost with their standards.
verses.bsb: The total number of men in the camp of Dan is 157,600; they shall set out last, under their standards.”

verses.esv: These are the people of Israel as listed by their fathers' houses. All those listed in the camps by their companies were 603,550.
verses.kjv: ¶ These are those which were numbered of the children of Israel by the house of their fathers: all those that were numbered of the camps throughout their hosts were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
verses.bsb: These are the Israelites, numbered according to their families. The total of those counted in the camps, by their divisions, was 603,550.

verses.esv: But the Levites were not listed among the people of Israel, as the LORD commanded Moses.
verses.kjv: But the Levites were not numbered among the children of Israel; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: But the Levites were not counted among the other Israelites, as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.esv: Thus did the people of Israel. According to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so they camped by their standards, and so they set out, each one in his clan, according to his fathers' house.
verses.kjv: And the children of Israel did according to all that the Lord commanded Moses: so they pitched by their standards, and so they set forward, every one after their families, according to the house of their fathers.
verses.bsb: So the Israelites did everything the LORD commanded Moses; they camped under their standards in this way and set out in the same way, each man with his clan and his family.

verses.esv: These are the generations of Aaron and Moses at the time when the LORD spoke with Moses on Mount Sinai.
verses.kjv: THESE also are the generations of Aaron and Moses in the day that the Lord spake with Moses in mount Sinai.
verses.bsb: This is the account of Aaron and Moses at the time the LORD spoke with Moses on Mount Sinai.

verses.esv: These are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the firstborn, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
verses.kjv: And these are the names of the sons of Aaron; Nadab the firstborn, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
verses.bsb: These are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the firstborn, then Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

verses.esv: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the anointed priests, whom he ordained to serve as priests.
verses.kjv: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the priests which were anointed, whom he consecrated to minister in the priest’s office.
verses.bsb: These were Aaron’s sons, the anointed priests, who were ordained to serve as priests.

verses.esv: But Nadab and Abihu died before the LORD when they offered unauthorized fire before the LORD in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children. So Eleazar and Ithamar served as priests in the lifetime of Aaron their father.
verses.kjv: And Nadab and Abihu died before the Lord, when they offered strange fire before the Lord, in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children: and Eleazar and Ithamar ministered in the priest’s office in the sight of Aaron their father.
verses.bsb: Nadab and Abihu, however, died in the presence of the LORD when they offered unauthorized fire before the LORD in the Wilderness of Sinai. And since they had no sons, only Eleazar and Ithamar served as priests during the lifetime of their father Aaron.

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Bring the tribe of Levi near, and set them before Aaron the priest, that they may minister to him.
verses.kjv: Bring the tribe of Levi near, and present them before Aaron the priest, that they may minister unto him.
verses.bsb: “Bring the tribe of Levi and present them to Aaron the priest to assist him.

verses.esv: They shall keep guard over him and over the whole congregation before the tent of meeting, as they minister at the tabernacle.
verses.kjv: And they shall keep his charge, and the charge of the whole congregation before the tabernacle of the congregation, to do the service of the tabernacle.
verses.bsb: They are to perform duties for him and for the whole congregation before the Tent of Meeting, attending to the service of the tabernacle.

verses.esv: They shall guard all the furnishings of the tent of meeting, and keep guard over the people of Israel as they minister at the tabernacle.
verses.kjv: And they shall keep all the instruments of the tabernacle of the congregation, and the charge of the children of Israel, to do the service of the tabernacle.
verses.bsb: They shall take care of all the furnishings of the Tent of Meeting and fulfill obligations for the Israelites by attending to the service of the tabernacle.

verses.esv: And you shall give the Levites to Aaron and his sons; they are wholly given to him from among the people of Israel.
verses.kjv: And thou shalt give the Levites unto Aaron and to his sons: they are wholly given unto him out of the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: Assign the Levites to Aaron and his sons; they have been given exclusively to him from among the Israelites.

verses.esv: And you shall appoint Aaron and his sons, and they shall guard their priesthood. But if any outsider comes near, he shall be put to death.”
verses.kjv: And thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons, and they shall wait on their priest’s office: and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.
verses.bsb: So you shall appoint Aaron and his sons to carry out the duties of the priesthood; but any outsider who approaches the tabernacle must be put to death.”

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Again the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,

verses.esv: “Behold, I have taken the Levites from among the people of Israel instead of every firstborn who opens the womb among the people of Israel. The Levites shall be mine,
verses.kjv: And I, behold, I have taken the Levites from among the children of Israel instead of all the firstborn that openeth the matrix among the children of Israel: therefore the Levites shall be mine;
verses.bsb: “Behold, I have taken the Levites from among the children of Israel in place of every firstborn Israelite from the womb. The Levites belong to Me,

verses.esv: for all the firstborn are mine. On the day that I struck down all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, I consecrated for my own all the firstborn in Israel, both of man and of beast. They shall be mine: I am the LORD.”
verses.kjv: Because all the firstborn are mine; for on the day that I smote all the firstborn in the land of Egypt I hallowed unto me all the firstborn in Israel, both man and beast: mine shall they be: I am the Lord.
verses.bsb: for all the firstborn are Mine. On the day I struck down every firstborn in the land of Egypt, I consecrated to Myself all the firstborn in Israel, both man and beast. They are Mine; I am the LORD.”

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD spoke to Moses in the Wilderness of Sinai, saying,

verses.esv: “List the sons of Levi, by fathers' houses and by clans; every male from a month old and upward you shall list.”
verses.kjv: Number the children of Levi after the house of their fathers, by their families: every male from a month old and upward shalt thou number them.
verses.bsb: “Number the Levites by their families and clans. You are to count every male a month old or more.”

verses.esv: So Moses listed them according to the word of the LORD, as he was commanded.
verses.kjv: And Moses numbered them according to the word of the Lord, as he was commanded.
verses.bsb: So Moses numbered them according to the word of the LORD, as he had been commanded.

verses.esv: And these were the sons of Levi by their names: Gershon and Kohath and Merari.
verses.kjv: And these were the sons of Levi by their names; Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari.
verses.bsb: These were the sons of Levi by name: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.esv: And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their clans: Libni and Shimei.
verses.kjv: And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their families; Libni, and Shimei.
verses.bsb: These were the names of the sons of Gershon by their clans: Libni and Shimei.

verses.esv: And the sons of Kohath by their clans: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Kohath by their families; Amram, and Izehar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
verses.bsb: The sons of Kohath by their clans were Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.esv: And the sons of Merari by their clans: Mahli and Mushi. These are the clans of the Levites, by their fathers' houses.
verses.kjv: And the sons of Merari by their families; Mahli, and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to the house of their fathers.
verses.bsb: And the sons of Merari by their clans were Mahli and Mushi. These were the clans of the Levites, according to their families.

verses.esv: To Gershon belonged the clan of the Libnites and the clan of the Shimeites; these were the clans of the Gershonites.
verses.kjv: Of Gershon was the family of the Libnites, and the family of the Shimites: these are the families of the Gershonites.
verses.bsb: From Gershon came the Libnite clan and the Shimeite clan; these were the Gershonite clans.

verses.esv: Their listing according to the number of all the males from a month old and upward was 7,500.
verses.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, even those that were numbered of them were seven thousand and five hundred.
verses.bsb: The number of all the males a month old or more was 7,500.

verses.esv: The clans of the Gershonites were to camp behind the tabernacle on the west,
verses.kjv: The families of the Gershonites shall pitch behind the tabernacle westward.
verses.bsb: The Gershonite clans were to camp on the west, behind the tabernacle,

verses.esv: with Eliasaph, the son of Lael as chief of the fathers' house of the Gershonites.
verses.kjv: And the chief of the house of the father of the Gershonites shall be Eliasaph the son of Lael.
verses.bsb: and the leader of the families of the Gershonites was Eliasaph son of Lael.

verses.esv: And the guard duty of the sons of Gershon in the tent of meeting involved the tabernacle, the tent with its covering, the screen for the entrance of the tent of meeting,
verses.kjv: And the charge of the sons of Gershon in the tabernacle of the congregation shall be the tabernacle, and the tent, the covering thereof, and the hanging for the door of the tabernacle of the congregation,
verses.bsb: The duties of the Gershonites at the Tent of Meeting were the tabernacle and tent, its covering, the curtain for the entrance to the Tent of Meeting,

verses.esv: the hangings of the court, the screen for the door of the court that is around the tabernacle and the altar, and its cords—all the service connected with these.
verses.kjv: And the hangings of the court, and the curtain for the door of the court, which is by the tabernacle, and by the altar round about, and the cords of it for all the service thereof.
verses.bsb: the curtains of the courtyard, the curtain for the entrance to the courtyard that surrounds the tabernacle and altar, and the cords—all the service for these items.

verses.esv: To Kohath belonged the clan of the Amramites and the clan of the Izharites and the clan of the Hebronites and the clan of the Uzzielites; these are the clans of the Kohathites.
verses.kjv: ¶ And of Kohath was the family of the Amramites, and the family of the Izeharites, and the family of the Hebronites, and the family of the Uzzielites: these are the families of the Kohathites.
verses.bsb: From Kohath came the clans of the Amramites, the Izharites, the Hebronites, and the Uzzielites; these were the clans of the Kohathites.

verses.esv: According to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, there were 8,600, keeping guard over the sanctuary.
verses.kjv: In the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were eight thousand and six hundred, keeping the charge of the sanctuary.
verses.bsb: The number of all the males a month old or more was 8,600. They were responsible for the duties of the sanctuary.

verses.esv: The clans of the sons of Kohath were to camp on the south side of the tabernacle,
verses.kjv: The families of the sons of Kohath shall pitch on the side of the tabernacle southward.
verses.bsb: The clans of the Kohathites were to camp on the south side of the tabernacle,

verses.esv: with Elizaphan the son of Uzziel as chief of the fathers' house of the clans of the Kohathites.
verses.kjv: And the chief of the house of the father of the families of the Kohathites shall be Elizaphan the son of Uzziel.
verses.bsb: and the leader of the families of the Kohathites was Elizaphan son of Uzziel.

verses.esv: And their guard duty involved the ark, the table, the lampstand, the altars, the vessels of the sanctuary with which the priests minister, and the screen; all the service connected with these.
verses.kjv: And their charge shall be the ark, and the table, and the candlestick, and the altars, and the vessels of the sanctuary wherewith they minister, and the hanging, and all the service thereof.
verses.bsb: Their duties were the ark, the table, the lampstand, the altars, the articles of the sanctuary used with them, and the curtain—all the service for these items.

verses.esv: And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest was to be chief over the chiefs of the Levites, and to have oversight of those who kept guard over the sanctuary.
verses.kjv: And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be chief over the chief of the Levites, and have the oversight of them that keep the charge of the sanctuary.
verses.bsb: The chief of the leaders of the Levites was Eleazar son of Aaron the priest; he oversaw those responsible for the duties of the sanctuary.

verses.esv: To Merari belonged the clan of the Mahlites and the clan of the Mushites: these are the clans of Merari.
verses.kjv: ¶ Of Merari was the family of the Mahlites, and the family of the Mushites: these are the families of Merari.
verses.bsb: From Merari came the clans of the Mahlites and Mushites; these were the Merarite clans.

verses.esv: Their listing according to the number of all the males from a month old and upward was 6,200.
verses.kjv: And those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were six thousand and two hundred.
verses.bsb: The number of all the males a month old or more was 6,200.

verses.esv: And the chief of the fathers' house of the clans of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail. They were to camp on the north side of the tabernacle.
verses.kjv: And the chief of the house of the father of the families of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail: these shall pitch on the side of the tabernacle northward.
verses.bsb: The leader of the families of the Merarites was Zuriel son of Abihail; they were to camp on the north side of the tabernacle.

verses.esv: And the appointed guard duty of the sons of Merari involved the frames of the tabernacle, the bars, the pillars, the bases, and all their accessories; all the service connected with these;
verses.kjv: And under the custody and charge of the sons of Merari shall be the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and the sockets thereof, and all the vessels thereof, and all that serveth thereto,
verses.bsb: The duties assigned to the sons of Merari were the tabernacle’s frames, crossbars, posts, bases, and all its equipment—all the service for these items,

verses.esv: also the pillars around the court, with their bases and pegs and cords.
verses.kjv: And the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords.
verses.bsb: as well as the posts of the surrounding courtyard with their bases, tent pegs, and ropes.

verses.esv: Those who were to camp before the tabernacle on the east, before the tent of meeting toward the sunrise, were Moses and Aaron and his sons, guarding the sanctuary itself, to protect the people of Israel. And any outsider who came near was to be put to death.
verses.kjv: ¶ But those that encamp before the tabernacle toward the east, even before the tabernacle of the congregation eastward, shall be Moses, and Aaron and his sons, keeping the charge of the sanctuary for the charge of the children of Israel; and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.
verses.bsb: Moses, Aaron, and Aaron’s sons were to camp to the east of the tabernacle, toward the sunrise, before the Tent of Meeting. They were to perform the duties of the sanctuary as a service on behalf of the Israelites; but any outsider who approached the sanctuary was to be put to death.

verses.esv: All those listed among the Levites, whom Moses and Aaron listed at the commandment of the LORD, by clans, all the males from a month old and upward, were 22,000.
verses.kjv: All that were numbered of the Levites, which Moses and Aaron numbered at the commandment of the Lord, throughout their families, all the males from a month old and upward, were twenty and two thousand.
verses.bsb: The total number of Levites that Moses and Aaron counted by their clans at the LORD’s command, including all the males a month old or more, was 22,000.

verses.esv: And the LORD said to Moses, “List all the firstborn males of the people of Israel, from a month old and upward, taking the number of their names.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord said unto Moses, Number all the firstborn of the males of the children of Israel from a month old and upward, and take the number of their names.
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses, “Number every firstborn male of the Israelites a month old or more, and list their names.

verses.esv: And you shall take the Levites for me—I am the LORD—instead of all the firstborn among the people of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the cattle of the people of Israel.”
verses.kjv: And thou shalt take the Levites for me (I am the Lord) instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel; and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstlings among the cattle of the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: You are to take the Levites for Me—I am the LORD—in place of all the firstborn of Israel, and the livestock of the Levites in place of all the firstborn of the livestock of the Israelites.”

verses.esv: So Moses listed all the firstborn among the people of Israel, as the LORD commanded him.
verses.kjv: And Moses numbered, as the Lord commanded him, all the firstborn among the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: So Moses numbered all the firstborn of the Israelites, as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.esv: And all the firstborn males, according to the number of names, from a month old and upward as listed were 22,273.
verses.kjv: And all the firstborn males by the number of names, from a month old and upward, of those that were numbered of them, were twenty and two thousand two hundred and threescore and thirteen.
verses.bsb: The total number of the firstborn males a month old or more, listed by name, was 22,273.

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Again the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,

verses.esv: “Take the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the people of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle. The Levites shall be mine: I am the LORD.
verses.kjv: Take the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle; and the Levites shall be mine: I am the Lord.
verses.bsb: “Take the Levites in place of all the firstborn of Israel, and the livestock of the Levites in place of their livestock. The Levites belong to Me; I am the LORD.

verses.esv: And as the redemption price for the 273 of the firstborn of the people of Israel, over and above the number of the male Levites,
verses.kjv: And for those that are to be redeemed of the two hundred and threescore and thirteen of the firstborn of the children of Israel, which are more than the Levites;
verses.bsb: To redeem the 273 firstborn Israelites who outnumber the Levites,

verses.esv: you shall take five shekels per head; you shall take them according to the shekel of the sanctuary (the shekel of twenty gerahs),
verses.kjv: Thou shalt even take five shekels apiece by the poll, after the shekel of the sanctuary shalt thou take them: (the shekel is twenty gerahs:)
verses.bsb: you are to collect five shekels for each one, according to the sanctuary shekel of twenty gerahs.

verses.esv: and give the money to Aaron and his sons as the redemption price for those who are over.”
verses.kjv: And thou shalt give the money, wherewith the odd number of them is to be redeemed, unto Aaron and to his sons.
verses.bsb: Give the money to Aaron and his sons as the redemption price for the excess among the Israelites.”

verses.esv: So Moses took the redemption money from those who were over and above those redeemed by the Levites.
verses.kjv: And Moses took the redemption money of them that were over and above them that were redeemed by the Levites:
verses.bsb: So Moses collected the redemption money from those in excess of the number redeemed by the Levites.

verses.esv: From the firstborn of the people of Israel he took the money, 1,365 shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary.
verses.kjv: Of the firstborn of the children of Israel took he the money; a thousand three hundred and threescore and five shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary:
verses.bsb: He collected the money from the firstborn of the Israelites: 1,365 shekels, according to the sanctuary shekel.

verses.esv: And Moses gave the redemption money to Aaron and his sons, according to the word of the LORD, as the LORD commanded Moses.
verses.kjv: And Moses gave the money of them that were redeemed unto Aaron and to his sons, according to the word of the Lord, as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: And Moses gave the redemption money to Aaron and his sons in obedience to the word of the LORD, just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron,

verses.esv: “Take a census of the sons of Kohath from among the sons of Levi, by their clans and their fathers' houses,
verses.kjv: Take the sum of the sons of Kohath from among the sons of Levi, after their families, by the house of their fathers,
verses.bsb: “Take a census of the Kohathites among the Levites by their clans and families,

verses.esv: from thirty years old up to fifty years old, all who can come on duty, to do the work in the tent of meeting.
verses.kjv: From thirty years old and upward even until fifty years old, all that enter into the host, to do the work in the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: men from thirty to fifty years old—everyone who is qualified to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: This is the service of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting: the most holy things.
verses.kjv: This shall be the service of the sons of Kohath in the tabernacle of the congregation, about the most holy things:
verses.bsb: This service of the Kohathites at the Tent of Meeting regards the most holy things.

verses.esv: When the camp is to set out, Aaron and his sons shall go in and take down the veil of the screen and cover the ark of the testimony with it.
verses.kjv: ¶ And when the camp setteth forward, Aaron shall come, and his sons, and they shall take down the covering vail, and cover the ark of testimony with it:
verses.bsb: Whenever the camp sets out, Aaron and his sons are to go in, take down the veil of the curtain, and cover the ark of the Testimony with it.

verses.esv: Then they shall put on it a covering of goatskin and spread on top of that a cloth all of blue, and shall put in its poles.
verses.kjv: And shall put thereon the covering of badgers’ skins, and shall spread over it a cloth wholly of blue, and shall put in the staves thereof.
verses.bsb: They are to place over this a covering of fine leather, spread a solid blue cloth over it, and insert its poles.

verses.esv: And over the table of the bread of the Presence they shall spread a cloth of blue and put on it the plates, the dishes for incense, the bowls, and the flagons for the drink offering; the regular showbread also shall be on it.
verses.kjv: And upon the table of shewbread they shall spread a cloth of blue, and put thereon the dishes, and the spoons, and the bowls, and covers to cover withal: and the continual bread shall be thereon:
verses.bsb: Over the table of the Presence they are to spread a blue cloth and place the plates and cups on it, along with the bowls and pitchers for the drink offering. The regular bread offering is to remain on it.

verses.esv: Then they shall spread over them a cloth of scarlet and cover the same with a covering of goatskin, and shall put in its poles.
verses.kjv: And they shall spread upon them a cloth of scarlet, and cover the same with a covering of badgers’ skins, and shall put in the staves thereof.
verses.bsb: And they shall spread a scarlet cloth over them, cover them with fine leather, and insert the poles.

verses.esv: And they shall take a cloth of blue and cover the lampstand for the light, with its lamps, its tongs, its trays, and all the vessels for oil with which it is supplied.
verses.kjv: And they shall take a cloth of blue, and cover the candlestick of the light, and his lamps, and his tongs, and his snuffdishes, and all the oil vessels thereof, wherewith they minister unto it:
verses.bsb: They are to take a blue cloth and cover the lampstand used for light, together with its lamps, wick trimmers, and trays, as well as the jars of oil with which to supply it.

verses.esv: And they shall put it with all its utensils in a covering of goatskin and put it on the carrying frame.
verses.kjv: And they shall put it and all the vessels thereof within a covering of badgers’ skins, and shall put it upon a bar.
verses.bsb: Then they shall wrap it and all its utensils inside a covering of fine leather and put it on the carrying frame.

verses.esv: And over the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of blue and cover it with a covering of goatskin, and shall put in its poles.
verses.kjv: And upon the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of blue, and cover it with a covering of badgers’ skins, and shall put to the staves thereof:
verses.bsb: Over the gold altar they are to spread a blue cloth, cover it with fine leather, and insert the poles.

verses.esv: And they shall take all the vessels of the service that are used in the sanctuary and put them in a cloth of blue and cover them with a covering of goatskin and put them on the carrying frame.
verses.kjv: And they shall take all the instruments of ministry, wherewith they minister in the sanctuary, and put them in a cloth of blue, and cover them with a covering of badgers’ skins, and shall put them on a bar:
verses.bsb: They are to take all the utensils for serving in the sanctuary, place them in a blue cloth, cover them with fine leather, and put them on the carrying frame.

verses.esv: And they shall take away the ashes from the altar and spread a purple cloth over it.
verses.kjv: And they shall take away the ashes from the altar, and spread a purple cloth thereon:
verses.bsb: Then they shall remove the ashes from the bronze altar, spread a purple cloth over it,

verses.esv: And they shall put on it all the utensils of the altar, which are used for the service there, the fire pans, the forks, the shovels, and the basins, all the utensils of the altar; and they shall spread on it a covering of goatskin, and shall put in its poles.
verses.kjv: And they shall put upon it all the vessels thereof, wherewith they minister about it, even the censers, the fleshhooks, and the shovels, and the basons, all the vessels of the altar; and they shall spread upon it a covering of badgers’ skins, and put to the staves of it.
verses.bsb: and place on it all the vessels used to serve there: the firepans, meat forks, shovels, and sprinkling bowls—all the equipment of the altar. They are to spread over it a covering of fine leather and insert the poles.

verses.esv: And when Aaron and his sons have finished covering the sanctuary and all the furnishings of the sanctuary, as the camp sets out, after that the sons of Kohath shall come to carry these, but they must not touch the holy things, lest they die. These are the things of the tent of meeting that the sons of Kohath are to carry.
verses.kjv: And when Aaron and his sons have made an end of covering the sanctuary, and all the vessels of the sanctuary, as the camp is to set forward; after that, the sons of Kohath shall come to bear it: but they shall not touch any holy thing, lest they die. These things are the burden of the sons of Kohath in the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: When Aaron and his sons have finished covering the holy objects and all their equipment, as soon as the camp is ready to move, the Kohathites shall come and do the carrying. But they must not touch the holy objects, or they will die. These are the transportation duties of the Kohathites regarding the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: “And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall have charge of the oil for the light, the fragrant incense, the regular grain offering, and the anointing oil, with the oversight of the whole tabernacle and all that is in it, of the sanctuary and its vessels.”
verses.kjv: ¶ And to the office of Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest pertaineth the oil for the light, and the sweet incense, and the daily meat offering, and the anointing oil, and the oversight of all the tabernacle, and of all that therein is, in the sanctuary, and in the vessels thereof.
verses.bsb: Eleazar son of Aaron the priest shall oversee the oil for the light, the fragrant incense, the daily grain offering, and the anointing oil. He has oversight of the entire tabernacle and everything in it, including the holy objects and their utensils.”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron,

verses.esv: “Let not the tribe of the clans of the Kohathites be destroyed from among the Levites,
verses.kjv: Cut ye not off the tribe of the families of the Kohathites from among the Levites:
verses.bsb: “Do not allow the Kohathite tribal clans to be cut off from among the Levites.

verses.esv: but deal thus with them, that they may live and not die when they come near to the most holy things: Aaron and his sons shall go in and appoint them each to his task and to his burden,
verses.kjv: But thus do unto them, that they may live, and not die, when they approach unto the most holy things: Aaron and his sons shall go in, and appoint them every one to his service and to his burden:
verses.bsb: In order that they may live and not die when they come near the most holy things, do this for them: Aaron and his sons are to go in and assign each man his task and what he is to carry.

verses.esv: but they shall not go in to look on the holy things even for a moment, lest they die.”
verses.kjv: But they shall not go in to see when the holy things are covered, lest they die.
verses.bsb: But the Kohathites are not to go in and look at the holy objects, even for a moment, or they will die.”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: And the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Take a census of the sons of Gershon also, by their fathers' houses and by their clans.
verses.kjv: Take also the sum of the sons of Gershon, throughout the houses of their fathers, by their families;
verses.bsb: “Take a census of the Gershonites as well, by their families and clans,

verses.esv: From thirty years old up to fifty years old, you shall list them, all who can come to do duty, to do service in the tent of meeting.
verses.kjv: From thirty years old and upward until fifty years old shalt thou number them; all that enter in to perform the service, to do the work in the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: from thirty to fifty years old, counting everyone who comes to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: This is the service of the clans of the Gershonites, in serving and bearing burdens:
verses.kjv: This is the service of the families of the Gershonites, to serve, and for burdens:
verses.bsb: This is the service of the Gershonite clans regarding work and transport:

verses.esv: they shall carry the curtains of the tabernacle and the tent of meeting with its covering and the covering of goatskin that is on top of it and the screen for the entrance of the tent of meeting
verses.kjv: And they shall bear the curtains of the tabernacle, and the tabernacle of the congregation, his covering, and the covering of the badgers’ skins that is above upon it, and the hanging for the door of the tabernacle of the congregation,
verses.bsb: They are to carry the curtains of the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting with the covering of fine leather over it, the curtains for the entrance to the Tent of Meeting,

verses.esv: and the hangings of the court and the screen for the entrance of the gate of the court that is around the tabernacle and the altar, and their cords and all the equipment for their service. And they shall do all that needs to be done with regard to them.
verses.kjv: And the hangings of the court, and the hanging for the door of the gate of the court, which is by the tabernacle and by the altar round about, and their cords, and all the instruments of their service, and all that is made for them: so shall they serve.
verses.bsb: the curtains of the courtyard, and the curtains for the entrance at the gate of the courtyard that surrounds the tabernacle and altar, along with their ropes and all the equipment for their service. The Gershonites will do all that needs to be done with these items.

verses.esv: All the service of the sons of the Gershonites shall be at the command of Aaron and his sons, in all that they are to carry and in all that they have to do. And you shall assign to their charge all that they are to carry.
verses.kjv: At the appointment of Aaron and his sons shall be all the service of the sons of the Gershonites, in all their burdens, and in all their service: and ye shall appoint unto them in charge all their burdens.
verses.bsb: All the service of the Gershonites—all their transport duties and other work—is to be done at the direction of Aaron and his sons; you are to assign to them all that they are responsible to carry.

verses.esv: This is the service of the clans of the sons of the Gershonites in the tent of meeting, and their guard duty is to be under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
verses.kjv: This is the service of the families of the sons of Gershon in the tabernacle of the congregation: and their charge shall be under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
verses.bsb: This is the service of the Gershonite clans at the Tent of Meeting, and their duties shall be under the direction of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.

verses.esv: “As for the sons of Merari, you shall list them by their clans and their fathers' houses.
verses.kjv: ¶ As for the sons of Merari, thou shalt number them after their families, by the house of their fathers;
verses.bsb: As for the sons of Merari, you are to number them by their clans and families,

verses.esv: From thirty years old up to fifty years old, you shall list them, everyone who can come on duty, to do the service of the tent of meeting.
verses.kjv: From thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old shalt thou number them, every one that entereth into the service, to do the work of the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: from thirty to fifty years old, counting everyone who comes to serve in the work of the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: And this is what they are charged to carry, as the whole of their service in the tent of meeting: the frames of the tabernacle, with its bars, pillars, and bases,
verses.kjv: And this is the charge of their burden, according to all their service in the tabernacle of the congregation; the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and sockets thereof,
verses.bsb: This is the duty for all their service at the Tent of Meeting: to carry the frames of the tabernacle with its crossbars, posts, and bases,

verses.esv: and the pillars around the court with their bases, pegs, and cords, with all their equipment and all their accessories. And you shall list by name the objects that they are required to carry.
verses.kjv: And the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords, with all their instruments, and with all their service: and by name ye shall reckon the instruments of the charge of their burden.
verses.bsb: and the posts of the surrounding courtyard with their bases, tent pegs, and ropes, including all their equipment and everything related to their use. You shall assign by name the items that they are responsible to carry.

verses.esv: This is the service of the clans of the sons of Merari, the whole of their service in the tent of meeting, under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.”
verses.kjv: This is the service of the families of the sons of Merari, according to all their service, in the tabernacle of the congregation, under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
verses.bsb: This is the service of the Merarite clans according to all their work at the Tent of Meeting, under the direction of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.”

verses.esv: And Moses and Aaron and the chiefs of the congregation listed the sons of the Kohathites, by their clans and their fathers' houses,
verses.kjv: ¶ And Moses and Aaron and the chief of the congregation numbered the sons of the Kohathites after their families, and after the house of their fathers,
verses.bsb: So Moses, Aaron, and the leaders of the congregation numbered the Kohathites by their clans and families,

verses.esv: from thirty years old up to fifty years old, everyone who could come on duty, for service in the tent of meeting;
verses.kjv: From thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entereth into the service, for the work in the tabernacle of the congregation:
verses.bsb: everyone from thirty to fifty years old who came to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: and those listed by clans were 2,750.
verses.kjv: And those that were numbered of them by their families were two thousand seven hundred and fifty.
verses.bsb: And those numbered by their clans totaled 2,750.

verses.esv: This was the list of the clans of the Kohathites, all who served in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron listed according to the commandment of the LORD by Moses.
verses.kjv: These were they that were numbered of the families of the Kohathites, all that might do service in the tabernacle of the congregation, which Moses and Aaron did number according to the commandment of the Lord by the hand of Moses.
verses.bsb: These were counted from the Kohathite clans, everyone who could serve at the Tent of Meeting. Moses and Aaron numbered them according to the command of the LORD through Moses.

verses.esv: Those listed of the sons of Gershon, by their clans and their fathers' houses,
verses.kjv: And those that were numbered of the sons of Gershon, throughout their families, and by the house of their fathers,
verses.bsb: Then the Gershonites were numbered by their clans and families,

verses.esv: from thirty years old up to fifty years old, everyone who could come on duty for service in the tent of meeting—
verses.kjv: From thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entereth into the service, for the work in the tabernacle of the congregation,
verses.bsb: everyone from thirty to fifty years old who came to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: those listed by their clans and their fathers' houses were 2,630.
verses.kjv: Even those that were numbered of them, throughout their families, by the house of their fathers, were two thousand and six hundred and thirty.
verses.bsb: And those numbered by their clans and families totaled 2,630.

verses.esv: This was the list of the clans of the sons of Gershon, all who served in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron listed according to the commandment of the LORD.
verses.kjv: These are they that were numbered of the families of the sons of Gershon, of all that might do service in the tabernacle of the congregation, whom Moses and Aaron did number according to the commandment of the Lord.
verses.bsb: These were counted from the Gershonite clans who served at the Tent of Meeting, whom Moses and Aaron counted at the LORD’s command.

verses.esv: Those listed of the clans of the sons of Merari, by their clans and their fathers' houses,
verses.kjv: ¶ And those that were numbered of the families of the sons of Merari, throughout their families, by the house of their fathers,
verses.bsb: And the Merarites were numbered by their clans and families,

verses.esv: from thirty years old up to fifty years old, everyone who could come on duty, for service in the tent of meeting—
verses.kjv: From thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that entereth into the service, for the work in the tabernacle of the congregation,
verses.bsb: everyone from thirty to fifty years old who came to serve in the work at the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: those listed by clans were 3,200.
verses.kjv: Even those that were numbered of them after their families, were three thousand and two hundred.
verses.bsb: The men registered by their clans numbered 3,200.

verses.esv: This was the list of the clans of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron listed according to the commandment of the LORD by Moses.
verses.kjv: These be those that were numbered of the families of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the word of the Lord by the hand of Moses.
verses.bsb: These were counted from the Merarite clans, whom Moses and Aaron numbered at the LORD’s command through Moses.

verses.esv: All those who were listed of the Levites, whom Moses and Aaron and the chiefs of Israel listed, by their clans and their fathers' houses,
verses.kjv: All those that were numbered of the Levites, whom Moses and Aaron and the chief of Israel numbered, after their families, and after the house of their fathers,
verses.bsb: So Moses, Aaron, and the leaders of Israel numbered by their clans and families all the Levites

verses.esv: from thirty years old up to fifty years old, everyone who could come to do the service of ministry and the service of bearing burdens in the tent of meeting,
verses.kjv: From thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old, every one that came to do the service of the ministry, and the service of the burden in the tabernacle of the congregation,
verses.bsb: from thirty to fifty years old who came to do the work of serving and carrying the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: those listed were 8,580.
verses.kjv: Even those that were numbered of them, were eight thousand and five hundred and fourscore.
verses.bsb: And the number of men was 8,580.

verses.esv: According to the commandment of the LORD through Moses they were listed, each one with his task of serving or carrying. Thus they were listed by him, as the LORD commanded Moses.
verses.kjv: According to the commandment of the Lord they were numbered by the hand of Moses, every one according to his service, and according to his burden: thus were they numbered of him, as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: At the LORD’s command they were numbered through Moses and each one was assigned his work and burden, as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Command the people of Israel that they put out of the camp everyone who is leprous or has a discharge and everyone who is unclean through contact with the dead.
verses.kjv: Command the children of Israel, that they put out of the camp every leper, and every one that hath an issue, and whosoever is defiled by the dead:
verses.bsb: “Command the Israelites to send away from the camp anyone with a skin disease, anyone who has a bodily discharge, and anyone who is defiled by a dead body.

verses.esv: You shall put out both male and female, putting them outside the camp, that they may not defile their camp, in the midst of which I dwell.”
verses.kjv: Both male and female shall ye put out, without the camp shall ye put them; that they defile not their camps, in the midst whereof I dwell.
verses.bsb: You must send away male and female alike; send them outside the camp so they will not defile their camp, where I dwell among them.”

verses.esv: And the people of Israel did so, and put them outside the camp; as the LORD said to Moses, so the people of Israel did.
verses.kjv: And the children of Israel did so, and put them out without the camp: as the Lord spake unto Moses, so did the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: So the Israelites did this, sending such people outside the camp. They did just as the LORD had instructed Moses.

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: And the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Speak to the people of Israel, When a man or woman commits any of the sins that people commit by breaking faith with the LORD, and that person realizes his guilt,
verses.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, When a man or woman shall commit any sin that men commit, to do a trespass against the Lord, and that person be guilty;
verses.bsb: “Tell the Israelites that when a man or woman acts unfaithfully against the LORD by committing any sin against another, that person is guilty

verses.esv: he shall confess his sin that he has committed. And he shall make full restitution for his wrong, adding a fifth to it and giving it to him to whom he did the wrong.
verses.kjv: Then they shall confess their sin which they have done: and he shall recompense his trespass with the principal thereof, and add unto it the fifth part thereof, and give it unto him against whom he hath trespassed.
verses.bsb: and must confess the sin he has committed. He must make full restitution, add a fifth to its value, and give all this to the one he has wronged.

verses.esv: But if the man has no next of kin to whom restitution may be made for the wrong, the restitution for wrong shall go to the LORD for the priest, in addition to the ram of atonement with which atonement is made for him.
verses.kjv: But if the man have no kinsman to recompense the trespass unto, let the trespass be recompensed unto the Lord, even to the priest; beside the ram of the atonement, whereby an atonement shall be made for him.
verses.bsb: But if the man has no relative to whom restitution can be made for the wrong, the restitution belongs to the LORD and must be given to the priest along with the ram of atonement, by which the atonement is made for him.

verses.esv: And every contribution, all the holy donations of the people of Israel, which they bring to the priest, shall be his.
verses.kjv: And every offering of all the holy things of the children of Israel, which they bring unto the priest, shall be his.
verses.bsb: Every sacred contribution the Israelites bring to the priest shall belong to him.

verses.esv: Each one shall keep his holy donations: whatever anyone gives to the priest shall be his.”
verses.kjv: And every man’s hallowed things shall be his: whatsoever any man giveth the priest, it shall be his.
verses.bsb: Each man’s sacred gifts are his own, but whatever he gives to the priest will belong to the priest.”

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,
