verses.esv: And they set out from Etham and turned back to Pi-hahiroth, which is east of Baal-zephon, and they camped before Migdol.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Etham, and turned again unto Pi-hahiroth, which is before Baal-zephon: and they pitched before Migdol.
verses.bsb: They set out from Etham and turned back to Pi-hahiroth, opposite Baal-zephon, and they camped near Migdol.

verses.esv: And they set out from before Hahiroth and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and they went a three days' journey in the wilderness of Etham and camped at Marah.
verses.kjv: And they departed from before Pi-hahiroth, and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and went three days’ journey in the wilderness of Etham, and pitched in Marah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Pi-hahiroth and crossed through the sea, into the wilderness, and they journeyed three days into the Wilderness of Etham and camped at Marah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Marah and came to Elim; at Elim there were twelve springs of water and seventy palm trees, and they camped there.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Marah, and came unto Elim: and in Elim were twelve fountains of water, and threescore and ten palm trees; and they pitched there.
verses.bsb: They set out from Marah and came to Elim, where there were twelve springs and seventy palm trees, and they camped there.

verses.esv: And they set out from Elim and camped by the Red Sea.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Elim, and encamped by the Red sea.
verses.bsb: They set out from Elim and camped by the Red Sea.

verses.esv: And they set out from the Red Sea and camped in the wilderness of Sin.
verses.kjv: And they removed from the Red sea, and encamped in the wilderness of Sin.
verses.bsb: They set out from the Red Sea and camped in the Desert of Sin.

verses.esv: And they set out from the wilderness of Sin and camped at Dophkah.
verses.kjv: And they took their journey out of the wilderness of Sin, and encamped in Dophkah.
verses.bsb: They set out from the Desert of Sin and camped at Dophkah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Dophkah and camped at Alush.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Dophkah, and encamped in Alush.
verses.bsb: They set out from Dophkah and camped at Alush.

verses.esv: And they set out from Alush and camped at Rephidim, where there was no water for the people to drink.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Alush, and encamped at Rephidim, where was no water for the people to drink.
verses.bsb: They set out from Alush and camped at Rephidim, where there was no water for the people to drink.

verses.esv: And they set out from Rephidim and camped in the wilderness of Sinai.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Rephidim, and pitched in the wilderness of Sinai.
verses.bsb: They set out from Rephidim and camped in the Wilderness of Sinai.

verses.esv: And they set out from the wilderness of Sinai and camped at Kibroth-hattaavah.
verses.kjv: And they removed from the desert of Sinai, and pitched at Kibroth-hattaavah.
verses.bsb: They set out from the Wilderness of Sinai and camped at Kibroth-hattaavah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Kibroth-hattaavah and camped at Hazeroth.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Kibroth-hattaavah, and encamped at Hazeroth.
verses.bsb: They set out from Kibroth-hattaavah and camped at Hazeroth.

verses.esv: And they set out from Hazeroth and camped at Rithmah.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Hazeroth, and pitched in Rithmah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Hazeroth and camped at Rithmah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Rithmah and camped at Rimmon-perez.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Rithmah, and pitched at Rimmon-parez.
verses.bsb: They set out from Rithmah and camped at Rimmon-perez.

verses.esv: And they set out from Rimmon-perez and camped at Libnah.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Rimmon-parez, and pitched in Libnah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Rimmon-perez and camped at Libnah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Libnah and camped at Rissah.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Libnah, and pitched at Rissah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Libnah and camped at Rissah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Rissah and camped at Kehelathah.
verses.kjv: And they journeyed from Rissah, and pitched in Kehelathah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Rissah and camped at Kehelathah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Kehelathah and camped at Mount Shepher.
verses.kjv: And they went from Kehelathah, and pitched in mount Shapher.
verses.bsb: They set out from Kehelathah and camped at Mount Shepher.

verses.esv: And they set out from Mount Shepher and camped at Haradah.
verses.kjv: And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Mount Shepher and camped at Haradah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Haradah and camped at Makheloth.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Haradah, and pitched in Makheloth.
verses.bsb: They set out from Haradah and camped at Makheloth.

verses.esv: And they set out from Makheloth and camped at Tahath.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Makheloth, and encamped at Tahath.
verses.bsb: They set out from Makheloth and camped at Tahath.

verses.esv: And they set out from Tahath and camped at Terah.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Tahath, and pitched at Tarah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Tahath and camped at Terah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Terah and camped at Mithkah.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Tarah, and pitched in Mithcah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Terah and camped at Mithkah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Mithkah and camped at Hashmonah.
verses.kjv: And they went from Mithcah, and pitched in Hashmonah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Mithkah and camped at Hashmonah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Hashmonah and camped at Moseroth.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Hashmonah, and encamped at Moseroth.
verses.bsb: They set out from Hashmonah and camped at Moseroth.

verses.esv: And they set out from Moseroth and camped at Bene-jaakan.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Moseroth, and pitched in Bene-jaakan.
verses.bsb: They set out from Moseroth and camped at Bene-jaakan.

verses.esv: And they set out from Bene-jaakan and camped at Hor-haggidgad.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Bene-jaakan, and encamped at Hor-hagidgad.
verses.bsb: They set out from Bene-jaakan and camped at Hor-haggidgad.

verses.esv: And they set out from Hor-haggidgad and camped at Jotbathah.
verses.kjv: And they went from Hor-hagidgad, and pitched in Jotbathah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Hor-haggidgad and camped at Jotbathah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Jotbathah and camped at Abronah.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Jotbathah, and encamped at Ebronah.
verses.bsb: They set out from Jotbathah and camped at Abronah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Abronah and camped at Ezion-geber.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Ebronah, and encamped at Ezion-gaber.
verses.bsb: They set out from Abronah and camped at Ezion-geber.

verses.esv: And they set out from Ezion-geber and camped in the wilderness of Zin (that is, Kadesh).
verses.kjv: And they removed from Ezion-gaber, and pitched in the wilderness of Zin, which is Kadesh.
verses.bsb: They set out from Ezion-geber and camped at Kadesh in the Wilderness of Zin.

verses.esv: And they set out from Kadesh and camped at Mount Hor, on the edge of the land of Edom.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Kadesh, and pitched in mount Hor, in the edge of the land of Edom.
verses.bsb: They set out from Kadesh and camped at Mount Hor, on the outskirts of the land of Edom.

verses.esv: And Aaron the priest went up Mount Hor at the command of the LORD and died there, in the fortieth year after the people of Israel had come out of the land of Egypt, on the first day of the fifth month.
verses.kjv: And Aaron the priest went up into mount Hor at the commandment of the Lord, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of Israel were come out of the land of Egypt, in the first day of the fifth month.
verses.bsb: At the LORD’s command, Aaron the priest climbed Mount Hor and died there on the first day of the fifth month, in the fortieth year after the Israelites had come out of the land of Egypt.

verses.esv: And Aaron was 123 years old when he died on Mount Hor.
verses.kjv: And Aaron was an hundred and twenty and three years old when he died in mount Hor.
verses.bsb: Aaron was 123 years old when he died on Mount Hor.

verses.esv: And the Canaanite, the king of Arad, who lived in the Negeb in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the people of Israel.
verses.kjv: And king Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: Now the Canaanite king of Arad, who lived in the Negev in the land of Canaan, heard that the Israelites were coming.

verses.esv: And they set out from Mount Hor and camped at Zalmonah.
verses.kjv: And they departed from mount Hor, and pitched in Zalmonah.
verses.bsb: And the Israelites set out from Mount Hor and camped at Zalmonah.

verses.esv: And they set out from Zalmonah and camped at Punon.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Zalmonah, and pitched in Punon.
verses.bsb: They set out from Zalmonah and camped at Punon.

verses.esv: And they set out from Punon and camped at Oboth.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Punon, and pitched in Oboth.
verses.bsb: They set out from Punon and camped at Oboth.

verses.esv: And they set out from Oboth and camped at Iye-abarim, in the territory of Moab.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Oboth, and pitched in Ije-abarim, in the border of Moab.
verses.bsb: They set out from Oboth and camped at Iye-abarim on the border of Moab.

verses.esv: And they set out from Iyim and camped at Dibon-gad.
verses.kjv: And they departed from Iim, and pitched in Dibon-gad.
verses.bsb: They set out from Iyim and camped at Dibon-gad.

verses.esv: And they set out from Dibon-gad and camped at Almon-diblathaim.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Dibon-gad, and encamped in Almon-diblathaim.
verses.bsb: They set out from Dibon-gad and camped at Almon-diblathaim.

verses.esv: And they set out from Almon-diblathaim and camped in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.
verses.kjv: And they removed from Almon-diblathaim, and pitched in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.
verses.bsb: They set out from Almon-diblathaim and camped in the mountains of Abarim facing Nebo.

verses.esv: And they set out from the mountains of Abarim and camped in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho;
verses.kjv: And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho.
verses.bsb: They set out from the mountains of Abarim and camped on the plains of Moab by the Jordan across from Jericho.

verses.esv: they camped by the Jordan from Beth-jeshimoth as far as Abel-shittim in the plains of Moab.
verses.kjv: And they pitched by Jordan, from Beth-jesimoth even unto Abel-shittim in the plains of Moab.
verses.bsb: And there on the plains of Moab they camped by the Jordan, from Beth-jeshimoth to Abel-shittim.

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,
verses.bsb: On the plains of Moab by the Jordan across from Jericho, the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,
verses.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye are passed over Jordan into the land of Canaan;
verses.bsb: “Speak to the Israelites and tell them: When you cross the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

verses.esv: then you shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you and destroy all their figured stones and destroy all their metal images and demolish all their high places.
verses.kjv: Then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their pictures, and destroy all their molten images, and quite pluck down all their high places:
verses.bsb: you must drive out before you all the inhabitants of the land, destroy all their carved images and cast idols, and demolish all their high places.

verses.esv: And you shall take possession of the land and settle in it, for I have given the land to you to possess it.
verses.kjv: And ye shall dispossess the inhabitants of the land, and dwell therein: for I have given you the land to possess it.
verses.bsb: You are to take possession of the land and settle in it, for I have given you the land to possess.

verses.esv: You shall inherit the land by lot according to your clans. To a large tribe you shall give a large inheritance, and to a small tribe you shall give a small inheritance. Wherever the lot falls for anyone, that shall be his. According to the tribes of your fathers you shall inherit.
verses.kjv: And ye shall divide the land by lot for an inheritance among your families: and to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer ye shall give the less inheritance: every man’s inheritance shall be in the place where his lot falleth; according to the tribes of your fathers ye shall inherit.
verses.bsb: And you are to divide the land by lot according to your clans. Give a larger inheritance to a larger clan and a smaller inheritance to a smaller one. Whatever falls to each one by lot will be his. You will receive an inheritance according to the tribes of your fathers.

verses.esv: But if you do not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you, then those of them whom you let remain shall be as barbs in your eyes and thorns in your sides, and they shall trouble you in the land where you dwell.
verses.kjv: But if ye will not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you; then it shall come to pass, that those which ye let remain of them shall be pricks in your eyes, and thorns in your sides, and shall vex you in the land wherein ye dwell.
verses.bsb: But if you do not drive out the inhabitants of the land before you, those you allow to remain will become barbs in your eyes and thorns in your sides; they will harass you in the land where you settle.

verses.esv: And I will do to you as I thought to do to them.”
verses.kjv: Moreover it shall come to pass, that I shall do unto you, as I thought to do unto them.
verses.bsb: And then I will do to you what I had planned to do to them.”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Command the people of Israel, and say to them, When you enter the land of Canaan (this is the land that shall fall to you for an inheritance, the land of Canaan as defined by its borders),
verses.kjv: Command the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye come into the land of Canaan; (this is the land that shall fall unto you for an inheritance, even the land of Canaan with the coasts thereof:)
verses.bsb: “Command the Israelites and say to them: When you enter the land of Canaan, it will be allotted to you as an inheritance with these boundaries:

verses.esv: your south side shall be from the wilderness of Zin alongside Edom, and your southern border shall run from the end of the Salt Sea on the east.
verses.kjv: Then your south quarter shall be from the wilderness of Zin along by the coast of Edom, and your south border shall be the outmost coast of the salt sea eastward:
verses.bsb: Your southern border will extend from the Wilderness of Zin along the border of Edom. On the east, your southern border will run from the end of the Salt Sea,

verses.esv: And your border shall turn south of the ascent of Akrabbim, and cross to Zin, and its limit shall be south of Kadesh-barnea. Then it shall go on to Hazar-addar, and pass along to Azmon.
verses.kjv: And your border shall turn from the south to the ascent of Akrabbim, and pass on to Zin: and the going forth thereof shall be from the south to Kadesh-barnea, and shall go on to Hazar-addar, and pass on to Azmon:
verses.bsb: cross south of the Ascent of Akrabbim, continue to Zin, and go south of Kadesh-barnea. Then it will go on to Hazar-addar and proceed to Azmon,

verses.esv: And the border shall turn from Azmon to the Brook of Egypt, and its limit shall be at the sea.
verses.kjv: And the border shall fetch a compass from Azmon unto the river of Egypt, and the goings out of it shall be at the sea.
verses.bsb: where it will turn from Azmon, join the Brook of Egypt, and end at the Sea.

verses.esv: “For the western border, you shall have the Great Sea and its coast. This shall be your western border.
verses.kjv: And as for the western border, ye shall even have the great sea for a border: this shall be your west border.
verses.bsb: Your western border will be the coastline of the Great Sea; this will be your boundary on the west.

verses.esv: “This shall be your northern border: from the Great Sea you shall draw a line to Mount Hor.
verses.kjv: And this shall be your north border: from the great sea ye shall point out for you mount Hor:
verses.bsb: Your northern border will run from the Great Sea directly to Mount Hor,

verses.esv: From Mount Hor you shall draw a line to Lebo-hamath, and the limit of the border shall be at Zedad.
verses.kjv: From mount Hor ye shall point out your border unto the entrance of Hamath; and the goings forth of the border shall be to Zedad:
verses.bsb: and from Mount Hor to Lebo-hamath, then extend to Zedad,

verses.esv: Then the border shall extend to Ziphron, and its limit shall be at Hazar-enan. This shall be your northern border.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the border shall go on to Ziphron, and the goings out of it shall be at Hazar-enan: this shall be your north border.
verses.bsb: continue to Ziphron, and end at Hazar-enan. This will be your boundary on the north.

verses.esv: “You shall draw a line for your eastern border from Hazar-enan to Shepham.
verses.kjv: And ye shall point out your east border from Hazar-enan to Shepham:
verses.bsb: And your eastern border will run straight from Hazar-enan to Shepham,

verses.esv: And the border shall go down from Shepham to Riblah on the east side of Ain. And the border shall go down and reach to the shoulder of the Sea of Chinnereth on the east.
verses.kjv: And the coast shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain; and the border shall descend, and shall reach unto the side of the sea of Chinnereth eastward:
verses.bsb: then go down from Shepham to Riblah on the east side of Ain and continue along the slopes east of the Sea of Chinnereth.

verses.esv: And the border shall go down to the Jordan, and its limit shall be at the Salt Sea. This shall be your land as defined by its borders all around.”
verses.kjv: And the border shall go down to Jordan, and the goings out of it shall be at the salt sea: this shall be your land with the coasts thereof round about.
verses.bsb: Then the border will go down along the Jordan and end at the Salt Sea.   This will be your land, defined by its borders on all sides.”

verses.esv: Moses commanded the people of Israel, saying, “This is the land that you shall inherit by lot, which the LORD has commanded to give to the nine tribes and to the half-tribe.
verses.kjv: And Moses commanded the children of Israel, saying, This is the land which ye shall inherit by lot, which the Lord commanded to give unto the nine tribes, and to the half tribe:
verses.bsb: So Moses commanded the Israelites, “Apportion this land by lot as an inheritance. The LORD has commanded that it be given to the nine and a half tribes.

verses.esv: For the tribe of the people of Reuben by fathers' houses and the tribe of the people of Gad by their fathers' houses have received their inheritance, and also the half-tribe of Manasseh.
verses.kjv: For the tribe of the children of Reuben according to the house of their fathers, and the tribe of the children of Gad according to the house of their fathers, have received their inheritance; and half the tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance:
verses.bsb: For the tribes of the Reubenites and Gadites, along with the half-tribe of Manasseh, have already received their inheritance.

verses.esv: The two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan east of Jericho, toward the sunrise.”
verses.kjv: The two tribes and the half tribe have received their inheritance on this side Jordan near Jericho eastward, toward the sunrising.
verses.bsb: These two and a half tribes have received their inheritance across the Jordan from Jericho, toward the sunrise.”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “These are the names of the men who shall divide the land to you for inheritance: Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun.
verses.kjv: These are the names of the men which shall divide the land unto you: Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun.
verses.bsb: “These are the names of the men who are to assign the land as an inheritance for you: Eleazar the priest and Joshua son of Nun.

verses.esv: You shall take one chief from every tribe to divide the land for inheritance.
verses.kjv: And ye shall take one prince of every tribe, to divide the land by inheritance.
verses.bsb: Appoint one leader from each tribe to distribute the land.

verses.esv: These are the names of the men: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
verses.kjv: And the names of the men are these: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
verses.bsb: These are their names:  Caleb son of Jephunneh from the tribe of Judah;

verses.esv: Of the tribe of the people of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.
verses.kjv: And of the tribe of the children of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.
verses.bsb: Shemuel son of Ammihud from the tribe of Simeon;

verses.esv: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon.
verses.kjv: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon.
verses.bsb: Elidad son of Chislon from the tribe of Benjamin;

verses.esv: Of the tribe of the people of Dan a chief, Bukki the son of Jogli.
verses.kjv: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Dan, Bukki the son of Jogli.
verses.bsb: Bukki son of Jogli, a leader from the tribe of Dan;

verses.esv: Of the people of Joseph: of the tribe of the people of Manasseh a chief, Hanniel the son of Ephod.
verses.kjv: The prince of the children of Joseph, for the tribe of the children of Manasseh, Hanniel the son of Ephod.
verses.bsb: Hanniel son of Ephod, a leader from the tribe of Manasseh son of Joseph;

verses.esv: And of the tribe of the people of Ephraim a chief, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan.
verses.kjv: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Ephraim, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan.
verses.bsb: Kemuel son of Shiphtan, a leader from the tribe of Ephraim;

verses.esv: Of the tribe of the people of Zebulun a chief, Elizaphan the son of Parnach.
verses.kjv: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Zebulun, Elizaphan the son of Parnach.
verses.bsb: Eli-zaphan son of Parnach, a leader from the tribe of Zebulun;

verses.esv: Of the tribe of the people of Issachar a chief, Paltiel the son of Azzan.
verses.kjv: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Issachar, Paltiel the son of Azzan.
verses.bsb: Paltiel son of Azzan, a leader from the tribe of Issachar;

verses.esv: And of the tribe of the people of Asher a chief, Ahihud the son of Shelomi.
verses.kjv: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Asher, Ahihud the son of Shelomi.
verses.bsb: Ahihud son of Shelomi, a leader from the tribe of Asher;

verses.esv: Of the tribe of the people of Naphtali a chief, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.”
verses.kjv: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Naphtali, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.
verses.bsb: and Pedahel son of Ammihud, a leader from the tribe of Naphtali.”

verses.esv: These are the men whom the LORD commanded to divide the inheritance for the people of Israel in the land of Canaan.
verses.kjv: These are they whom the Lord commanded to divide the inheritance unto the children of Israel in the land of Canaan.
verses.bsb: These are the ones whom the LORD commanded to apportion the inheritance to the Israelites in the land of Canaan.

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,
verses.bsb: Again the LORD spoke to Moses on the plains of Moab by the Jordan across from Jericho:

verses.esv: “Command the people of Israel to give to the Levites some of the inheritance of their possession as cities for them to dwell in. And you shall give to the Levites pasturelands around the cities.
verses.kjv: Command the children of Israel, that they give unto the Levites of the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and ye shall give also unto the Levites suburbs for the cities round about them.
verses.bsb: “Command the Israelites to give, from the inheritance they will possess, cities for the Levites to live in and pasturelands around the cities.

verses.esv: The cities shall be theirs to dwell in, and their pasturelands shall be for their cattle and for their livestock and for all their beasts.
verses.kjv: And the cities shall they have to dwell in; and the suburbs of them shall be for their cattle, and for their goods, and for all their beasts.
verses.bsb: The cities will be for them to live in, and the pasturelands will be for their herds, their flocks, and all their other livestock.

verses.esv: The pasturelands of the cities, which you shall give to the Levites, shall reach from the wall of the city outward a thousand cubits all around.
verses.kjv: And the suburbs of the cities, which ye shall give unto the Levites, shall reach from the wall of the city and outward a thousand cubits round about.
verses.bsb: The pasturelands around the cities you are to give the Levites will extend a thousand cubits from the wall on every side.

verses.esv: And you shall measure, outside the city, on the east side two thousand cubits, and on the south side two thousand cubits, and on the west side two thousand cubits, and on the north side two thousand cubits, the city being in the middle. This shall belong to them as pastureland for their cities.
verses.kjv: And ye shall measure from without the city on the east side two thousand cubits, and on the south side two thousand cubits, and on the west side two thousand cubits, and on the north side two thousand cubits; and the city shall be in the midst: this shall be to them the suburbs of the cities.
verses.bsb: You are also to measure two thousand cubits outside the city on the east, two thousand on the south, two thousand on the west, and two thousand on the north, with the city in the center. These areas will serve as larger pasturelands for the cities.

verses.esv: “The cities that you give to the Levites shall be the six cities of refuge, where you shall permit the manslayer to flee, and in addition to them you shall give forty-two cities.
verses.kjv: And among the cities which ye shall give unto the Levites there shall be six cities for refuge, which ye shall appoint for the manslayer, that he may flee thither: and to them ye shall add forty and two cities.
verses.bsb: Six of the cities you give the Levites are to be appointed as cities of refuge, to which a manslayer may flee. In addition to these, give the Levites forty-two other cities.

verses.esv: All the cities that you give to the Levites shall be forty-eight, with their pasturelands.
verses.kjv: So all the cities which ye shall give to the Levites shall be forty and eight cities: them shall ye give with their suburbs.
verses.bsb: The total number of cities you give the Levites will be forty-eight, with their corresponding pasturelands.

verses.esv: And as for the cities that you shall give from the possession of the people of Israel, from the larger tribes you shall take many, and from the smaller tribes you shall take few; each, in proportion to the inheritance that it inherits, shall give of its cities to the Levites.”
verses.kjv: And the cities which ye shall give shall be of the possession of the children of Israel: from them that have many ye shall give many; but from them that have few ye shall give few: every one shall give of his cities unto the Levites according to his inheritance which he inheriteth.
verses.bsb: The cities that you apportion from the territory of the Israelites should be given to the Levites in proportion to the inheritance of each tribe: more from a larger tribe and less from a smaller one.”

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you cross the Jordan into the land of Canaan,
verses.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye be come over Jordan into the land of Canaan;
verses.bsb: “Speak to the Israelites and tell them: When you cross the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

verses.esv: then you shall select cities to be cities of refuge for you, that the manslayer who kills any person without intent may flee there.
verses.kjv: Then ye shall appoint you cities to be cities of refuge for you; that the slayer may flee thither, which killeth any person at unawares.
verses.bsb: designate cities to serve as your cities of refuge, so that a person who kills someone unintentionally may flee there.

verses.esv: The cities shall be for you a refuge from the avenger, that the manslayer may not die until he stands before the congregation for judgment.
verses.kjv: And they shall be unto you cities for refuge from the avenger; that the manslayer die not, until he stand before the congregation in judgment.
verses.bsb: You are to have these cities as a refuge from the avenger, so that the manslayer will not die until he stands trial before the assembly.

verses.esv: And the cities that you give shall be your six cities of refuge.
verses.kjv: And of these cities which ye shall give six cities shall ye have for refuge.
verses.bsb: The cities you select will be your six cities of refuge.

verses.esv: You shall give three cities beyond the Jordan, and three cities in the land of Canaan, to be cities of refuge.
verses.kjv: Ye shall give three cities on this side Jordan, and three cities shall ye give in the land of Canaan, which shall be cities of refuge.
verses.bsb: Select three cities across the Jordan and three in the land of Canaan as cities of refuge.

verses.esv: These six cities shall be for refuge for the people of Israel, and for the stranger and for the sojourner among them, that anyone who kills any person without intent may flee there.
verses.kjv: These six cities shall be a refuge, both for the children of Israel, and for the stranger, and for the sojourner among them: that every one that killeth any person unawares may flee thither.
verses.bsb: These six cities will serve as a refuge for the Israelites and for the foreigner or stranger among them, so that anyone who kills a person unintentionally may flee there.

verses.esv: “But if he struck him down with an iron object, so that he died, he is a murderer. The murderer shall be put to death.
verses.kjv: And if he smite him with an instrument of iron, so that he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall surely be put to death.
verses.bsb: If, however, anyone strikes a person with an iron object and kills him, he is a murderer; the murderer must surely be put to death.

verses.esv: And if he struck him down with a stone tool that could cause death, and he died, he is a murderer. The murderer shall be put to death.
verses.kjv: And if he smite him with throwing a stone, wherewith he may die, and he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall surely be put to death.
verses.bsb: Or if anyone has in his hand a stone of deadly size, and he strikes and kills another, he is a murderer; the murderer must surely be put to death.

verses.esv: Or if he struck him down with a wooden tool that could cause death, and he died, he is a murderer. The murderer shall be put to death.
verses.kjv: Or if he smite him with an hand weapon of wood, wherewith he may die, and he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall surely be put to death.
verses.bsb: If anyone has in his hand a deadly object of wood, and he strikes and kills another, he is a murderer; the murderer must surely be put to death.

verses.esv: The avenger of blood shall himself put the murderer to death; when he meets him, he shall put him to death.
verses.kjv: The revenger of blood himself shall slay the murderer: when he meeteth him, he shall slay him.
verses.bsb: The avenger of blood is to put the murderer to death; when he finds him, he is to kill him.

verses.esv: And if he pushed him out of hatred or hurled something at him, lying in wait, so that he died,
verses.kjv: But if he thrust him of hatred, or hurl at him by laying of wait, that he die;
verses.bsb: Likewise, if anyone maliciously pushes another or intentionally throws an object at him and kills him,

verses.esv: or in enmity struck him down with his hand, so that he died, then he who struck the blow shall be put to death. He is a murderer. The avenger of blood shall put the murderer to death when he meets him.
verses.kjv: Or in enmity smite him with his hand, that he die: he that smote him shall surely be put to death; for he is a murderer: the revenger of blood shall slay the murderer, when he meeteth him.
verses.bsb: or if in hostility he strikes him with his hand and he dies, the one who struck him must surely be put to death; he is a murderer. When the avenger of blood finds the murderer, he is to kill him.

verses.esv: “But if he pushed him suddenly without enmity, or hurled anything on him without lying in wait
verses.kjv: But if he thrust him suddenly without enmity, or have cast upon him any thing without laying of wait,
verses.bsb: But if anyone pushes a person suddenly, without hostility, or throws an object at him unintentionally,

verses.esv: or used a stone that could cause death, and without seeing him dropped it on him, so that he died, though he was not his enemy and did not seek his harm,
verses.kjv: Or with any stone, wherewith a man may die, seeing him not, and cast it upon him, that he die, and was not his enemy, neither sought his harm:
verses.bsb: or without looking drops a heavy stone that kills him, but he was not an enemy and did not intend to harm him,

verses.esv: then the congregation shall judge between the manslayer and the avenger of blood, in accordance with these rules.
verses.kjv: Then the congregation shall judge between the slayer and the revenger of blood according to these judgments:
verses.bsb: then the congregation must judge between the slayer and the avenger of blood according to these ordinances.

verses.esv: And the congregation shall rescue the manslayer from the hand of the avenger of blood, and the congregation shall restore him to his city of refuge to which he had fled, and he shall live in it until the death of the high priest who was anointed with the holy oil.
verses.kjv: And the congregation shall deliver the slayer out of the hand of the revenger of blood, and the congregation shall restore him to the city of his refuge, whither he was fled: and he shall abide in it unto the death of the high priest, which was anointed with the holy oil.
verses.bsb: The assembly is to protect the manslayer from the hand of the avenger of blood. Then the assembly will return him to the city of refuge to which he fled, and he must live there until the death of the high priest, who was anointed with the holy oil.

verses.esv: But if the manslayer shall at any time go beyond the boundaries of his city of refuge to which he fled,
verses.kjv: But if the slayer shall at any time come without the border of the city of his refuge, whither he was fled;
verses.bsb: But if the manslayer ever goes outside the limits of the city of refuge to which he fled

verses.esv: and the avenger of blood finds him outside the boundaries of his city of refuge, and the avenger of blood kills the manslayer, he shall not be guilty of blood.
verses.kjv: And the revenger of blood find him without the borders of the city of his refuge, and the revenger of blood kill the slayer; he shall not be guilty of blood:
verses.bsb: and the avenger of blood finds him outside of his city of refuge and kills him, then the avenger will not be guilty of bloodshed

verses.esv: For he must remain in his city of refuge until the death of the high priest, but after the death of the high priest the manslayer may return to the land of his possession.
verses.kjv: Because he should have remained in the city of his refuge until the death of the high priest: but after the death of the high priest the slayer shall return into the land of his possession.
verses.bsb: because the manslayer must remain in his city of refuge until the death of the high priest. Only after the death of the high priest may he return to the land he owns.

verses.esv: And these things shall be for a statute and rule for you throughout your generations in all your dwelling places.
verses.kjv: So these things shall be for a statute of judgment unto you throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
verses.bsb: This will be a statutory ordinance for you for the generations to come, wherever you live.

verses.esv: “If anyone kills a person, the murderer shall be put to death on the evidence of witnesses. But no person shall be put to death on the testimony of one witness.
verses.kjv: Whoso killeth any person, the murderer shall be put to death by the mouth of witnesses: but one witness shall not testify against any person to cause him to die.
verses.bsb: If anyone kills a person, the murderer is to be put to death on the testimony of the witnesses. But no one is to be put to death based on the testimony of a lone witness.

verses.esv: Moreover, you shall accept no ransom for the life of a murderer, who is guilty of death, but he shall be put to death.
verses.kjv: Moreover ye shall take no satisfaction for the life of a murderer, which is guilty of death: but he shall be surely put to death.
verses.bsb: You are not to accept a ransom for the life of a murderer who deserves to die; he must surely be put to death.

verses.esv: And you shall accept no ransom for him who has fled to his city of refuge, that he may return to dwell in the land before the death of the high priest.
verses.kjv: And ye shall take no satisfaction for him that is fled to the city of his refuge, that he should come again to dwell in the land, until the death of the priest.
verses.bsb: Nor should you accept a ransom for the person who flees to a city of refuge and allow him to return and live on his own land before the death of the high priest.

verses.esv: You shall not pollute the land in which you live, for blood pollutes the land, and no atonement can be made for the land for the blood that is shed in it, except by the blood of the one who shed it.
verses.kjv: So ye shall not pollute the land wherein ye are: for blood it defileth the land: and the land cannot be cleansed of the blood that is shed therein, but by the blood of him that shed it.
verses.bsb: Do not pollute the land where you live, for bloodshed pollutes the land, and no atonement can be made for the land on which the blood is shed, except by the blood of the one who shed it.

verses.esv: You shall not defile the land in which you live, in the midst of which I dwell, for I the LORD dwell in the midst of the people of Israel.”
verses.kjv: Defile not therefore the land which ye shall inhabit, wherein I dwell: for I the Lord dwell among the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: Do not defile the land where you live and where I dwell. For I, the LORD, dwell among the Israelites.”

verses.esv: The heads of the fathers' houses of the clan of the people of Gilead the son of Machir, son of Manasseh, from the clans of the people of Joseph, came near and spoke before Moses and before the chiefs, the heads of the fathers' houses of the people of Israel.
verses.kjv: AND the chief fathers of the families of the children of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of the sons of Joseph, came near, and spake before Moses, and before the princes, the chief fathers of the children of Israel:
verses.bsb: Now the family heads of the clan of Gilead son of Machir son of Manasseh, one of the clans of Joseph, approached Moses and the leaders who were the heads of the Israelite families and addressed them,

verses.esv: They said, “The LORD commanded my lord to give the land for inheritance by lot to the people of Israel, and my lord was commanded by the LORD to give the inheritance of Zelophehad our brother to his daughters.
verses.kjv: And they said, The Lord commanded my lord to give the land for an inheritance by lot to the children of Israel: and my lord was commanded by the Lord to give the inheritance of Zelophehad our brother unto his daughters.
verses.bsb: saying, “When the LORD commanded my lord to give the land as an inheritance to the Israelites by lot, He also commanded him to give the inheritance of our brother Zelophehad to his daughters.

verses.esv: But if they are married to any of the sons of the other tribes of the people of Israel, then their inheritance will be taken from the inheritance of our fathers and added to the inheritance of the tribe into which they marry. So it will be taken away from the lot of our inheritance.
verses.kjv: And if they be married to any of the sons of the other tribes of the children of Israel, then shall their inheritance be taken from the inheritance of our fathers, and shall be put to the inheritance of the tribe whereunto they are received: so shall it be taken from the lot of our inheritance.
verses.bsb: But if they marry any of the men from the other tribes of Israel, their inheritance will be withdrawn from the portion of our fathers and added to the tribe into which they marry. So our allotted inheritance would be taken away.

verses.esv: And when the jubilee of the people of Israel comes, then their inheritance will be added to the inheritance of the tribe into which they marry, and their inheritance will be taken from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers.”
verses.kjv: And when the jubile of the children of Israel shall be, then shall their inheritance be put unto the inheritance of the tribe whereunto they are received: so shall their inheritance be taken away from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers.
verses.bsb: And when the Jubilee for the Israelites comes, their inheritance will be added to the tribe into which they marry and taken away from the tribe of our fathers.”

verses.esv: And Moses commanded the people of Israel according to the word of the LORD, saying, “The tribe of the people of Joseph is right.
verses.kjv: And Moses commanded the children of Israel according to the word of the Lord, saying, The tribe of the sons of Joseph hath said well.
verses.bsb: So at the word of the LORD, Moses commanded the Israelites: “The tribe of the sons of Joseph speaks correctly.

verses.esv: This is what the LORD commands concerning the daughters of Zelophehad: ‘Let them marry whom they think best, only they shall marry within the clan of the tribe of their father.
verses.kjv: This is the thing which the Lord doth command concerning the daughters of Zelophehad, saying, Let them marry to whom they think best; only to the family of the tribe of their father shall they marry.
verses.bsb: This is what the LORD has commanded concerning the daughters of Zelophehad: They may marry anyone they please, provided they marry within a clan of the tribe of their father.

verses.esv: The inheritance of the people of Israel shall not be transferred from one tribe to another, for every one of the people of Israel shall hold on to the inheritance of the tribe of his fathers.
verses.kjv: So shall not the inheritance of the children of Israel remove from tribe to tribe: for every one of the children of Israel shall keep himself to the inheritance of the tribe of his fathers.
verses.bsb: No inheritance in Israel may be transferred from tribe to tribe, because each of the Israelites is to retain the inheritance of the tribe of his fathers.

verses.esv: And every daughter who possesses an inheritance in any tribe of the people of Israel shall be wife to one of the clan of the tribe of her father, so that every one of the people of Israel may possess the inheritance of his fathers.
verses.kjv: And every daughter, that possesseth an inheritance in any tribe of the children of Israel, shall be wife unto one of the family of the tribe of her father, that the children of Israel may enjoy every man the inheritance of his fathers.
verses.bsb: Every daughter who possesses an inheritance from any Israelite tribe must marry within a clan of the tribe of her father, so that every Israelite will possess the inheritance of his fathers.

verses.esv: So no inheritance shall be transferred from one tribe to another, for each of the tribes of the people of Israel shall hold on to its own inheritance.’”
verses.kjv: Neither shall the inheritance remove from one tribe to another tribe; but every one of the tribes of the children of Israel shall keep himself to his own inheritance.
verses.bsb: No inheritance may be transferred from one tribe to another, for each tribe of Israel must retain its inheritance.”

verses.esv: The daughters of Zelophehad did as the LORD commanded Moses,
verses.kjv: Even as the Lord commanded Moses, so did the daughters of Zelophehad:
verses.bsb: So the daughters of Zelophehad did as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.esv: for Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Noah, the daughters of Zelophehad, were married to sons of their father's brothers.
verses.kjv: For Mahlah, Tirzah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Noah, the daughters of Zelophehad, were married unto their father’s brothers’ sons:
verses.bsb: Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Noah, the daughters of Zelophehad, were married to cousins on their father’s side.

verses.esv: They were married into the clans of the people of Manasseh the son of Joseph, and their inheritance remained in the tribe of their father's clan.
verses.kjv: And they were married into the families of the sons of Manasseh the son of Joseph, and their inheritance remained in the tribe of the family of their father.
verses.bsb: They married within the clans of the descendants of Manasseh son of Joseph, and their inheritance remained within the tribe of their father’s clan.

verses.esv: These are the commandments and the rules that the LORD commanded through Moses to the people of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.
verses.kjv: These are the commandments and the judgments, which the Lord commanded by the hand of Moses unto the children of Israel in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho.
verses.bsb: These are the commandments and ordinances that the LORD gave the Israelites through Moses on the plains of Moab by the Jordan across from Jericho.
